SEARCH
Package xyz.yaszu.freedom.Entities

Interface BaseEntity

All Known Implementing Classes:
Capybara
public interface BaseEntity

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.bukkit.entity.EntityType
    baseType()
    The vanilla EntityType this custom entity is based on.
    default boolean
    canSpawnIn(org.bukkit.block.Biome biome)
    Checks whether a given biome is valid for this entity to spawn in.
    List<com.destroystokyo.paper.entity.ai.GoalKey<? extends org.bukkit.entity.Mob>>
    goals()
    The goal keys defining this entity's AI behaviour, in priority order (index 0 = highest priority).
    int
    health()
    Current health of the entity.
    default kr.toxicity.model.api.tracker.EntityTracker
    initialize(org.bukkit.Location location)
    Spawns and initializes this custom entity at the given location.
    default boolean
    isThis(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
    Checks whether a given entity is tagged as this custom entity type.
    int
    maxHealth()
    Maximum health of the entity.
    String
    name()
    The unique name/identifier of this custom entity.
    default kr.toxicity.model.api.tracker.EntityTracker
    restore(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
    Restores this entity's attributes, PDC tag, goals, and model.
    List<org.bukkit.block.Biome>
    spawnBiomes()
    The biomes this entity is allowed to spawn in.

  • Method Details

    • baseType

      org.bukkit.entity.EntityType baseType()
      The vanilla EntityType this custom entity is based on.

    • health

      int health()
      Current health of the entity.

    • maxHealth

      int maxHealth()
      Maximum health of the entity.

    • name

      String name()
      The unique name/identifier of this custom entity. Used for model lookup and PDC tagging.

    • spawnBiomes

      List<org.bukkit.block.Biome> spawnBiomes()
      The biomes this entity is allowed to spawn in.

    • goals

      List<com.destroystokyo.paper.entity.ai.GoalKey<? extends org.bukkit.entity.Mob>> goals()
      The goal keys defining this entity's AI behaviour, in priority order (index 0 = highest priority).

    • restore

      default kr.toxicity.model.api.tracker.EntityTracker restore(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
      Restores this entity's attributes, PDC tag, goals, and model. Goals are fetched from the live mob before clearing to avoid null lookups.
      Parameters:
      entity - The entity to restore state onto.
      Returns:
      The EntityTracker for the restored entity, or null if model not found.

    • isThis

      default boolean isThis(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
      Checks whether a given entity is tagged as this custom entity type.
      Parameters:
      entity - The entity to check.
      Returns:
      true if the entity's PDC name matches this entity's name.

    • canSpawnIn

      default boolean canSpawnIn(org.bukkit.block.Biome biome)
      Checks whether a given biome is valid for this entity to spawn in.
      Parameters:
      biome - The biome to check.
      Returns:
      true if the biome is in the spawn biomes list.

    • initialize

      default kr.toxicity.model.api.tracker.EntityTracker initialize(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Spawns and initializes this custom entity at the given location. Applies goals, attributes, PDC tag, and model.
      Parameters:
      location - The location to spawn the entity at.
      Returns:
      The EntityTracker for the spawned entity, or null if model not found.
